criteria.criterionText: Then watchlist files should not block promotion by themselves
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Cannot verify if watchlist files block promotion without access to the generated report or system output indicating promotion status.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the `report.md` and live-call receipt to observe promotion blocking behavior.

criteria.criterionText: But a file should block promotion when it has:
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Cannot verify if files with the specified characteristics (generic mechanics, mixed responsibilities, generated artifacts, undeclared source files) block promotion without access to the generated report or system output.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the `report.md` and live-call receipt to observe promotion blocking behavior under these conditions.

criteria.criterionText: And blocking findings should appear before dense method tables
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Cannot verify the ordering of findings in the report without access to the actual `report.md` content.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the `report.md` to inspect the order of findings.

criteria.criterionText: And the product owner should see whether the issue is a product-boundary problem or a package-extraction problem.
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Cannot verify the clarity or presence of issue categorization (product-boundary vs. package-extraction) without access to the actual `report.md` content.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the `report.md` to assess the clarity of issue categorization.
